description_long: This lamppost features a tall, slender, fluted black metal pole with subtle decorative ridges and a robust cylindrical base. The top is crowned with a classic lantern-style lamp head, which has a domed cap and frosted glass panels, evoking a vintage or Victorian aesthetic. The lamp head is slightly wider than the pole and is topped with a small finial. The base appears reinforced and may contain access panels for maintenance. The overall finish is matte black with hints of weathering, suggesting outdoor durability. No signage, banners, or additional attachments are visible on the structure.
description: A tall, black, vintage-style lamppost with a fluted pole and a classic lantern head featuring frosted glass panels and a domed cap.
description_view_0: Front view showing the fluted pole, cylindrical base, and the lantern head with its frosted glass panels and domed cap.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slender profile of the pole and the symmetrical design of the lantern head.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the lantern head and the robust base, with no visible attachments.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, emphasizing the vertical alignment and decorative ridges on the pole.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Classic Victorian lantern with a domed cap, frosted glass panels, and a decorative finial.
